channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: RFK Jr. Moves to Overhaul Preventive Health Panel That Guides Free Insurance Coverage
item.description: Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is moving to overhaul a key federal panel that determines which preventive medical services ...

item.title: After Mitch McConnell Releases Statement-Photo, Conspiracy Theorists Are Still Going Off the Rails
Exposed docs reveal why Tim Walz board awarded repeat child rapist pardon: ‘No future’
item.description: Marco Rubio terminated the legal status of a convicted child rapist who received a full pardon from Tim Walz's board over deportation concerns.

item.title: Watch: Friend and Fellow SC Sen. Tim Scott Sends Off Lindsey Graham With Lovely In Memoriam
